A transient increase in vital signs (systolic and diastolic blood pressure and heart rate) was observed in the MDMA group (Supplementary Table 4). Numeric values are in Supplementary Table 4, not available in main text.

A transient increase in vital signs (systolic and diastolic blood pressure and heart rate) was observed in the MDMA group (Supplementary Table 4). Numeric values are in Supplementary Table 4, not available in main text.

A transient increase in vital signs (systolic and diastolic blood pressure and heart rate) was observed in the MDMA group (Supplementary Table 4). Numeric values are in Supplementary Table 4, not available in main text.
No effects of medication group, time, or their interaction were observed for systolic blood pressure (Placebo, M = 120.9 mmHg, SE = 1.66; LDX, M = 122.6 mmHg, SE = 1.71).
Diastolic blood pressure tended to fluctuate slightly over time, F(13, 285) = 2.21, p = 0.0094, (Placebo, M = 74.0 mmHg, SE = 0.96; LDX, M = 74.5 mmHg, SE = 0.99).
